synopsis: Collects Star Wars: Dark Times – Fire Carrier (2013) #1-5, Star Wars: Dark Times – A Spark Remains (2013) #1-5, Star Wars: Darth Vader and The Ninth Assassin (2013) #1-5, Star Wars: Darth Vader and The Cry of Shadows (2013) #1-5, Star Wars: Droids Special (1995) #1, Star Wars: Droids (1994) #1-6, Star Wars: Droids (1995) #1-8, and Star Wars: The Protocol Offensive (1997) #1, and material from Star Wars Visionaries; Star Wars Tales (1999) #11-12, 15, & 20; Dark Horse Presents Annual ’99; and Star Wars Galaxy Magazine #1.
title: Star Wars Legends: The Empire Omnibus Vol. 2
